headlines.headline: Jovik Asset Group to host investor day focused on renewable storage strategy

sentiment.reasoning: An investor day focused on strategy is a standard corporate event that typically provides neutral to slightly positive sentiment without immediate financial impact.

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational activity that is expected and typically has no material financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
